basic_details.job_title: Salem Aavin Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Salem District Cooperative Milk Producers Union Ltd. (Salem Aavin)
basic_details.short_information: Salem District Cooperative Milk Producers Union Ltd. (Salem Aavin) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with B.V.Sc & AH, Veterinary Council Registration qualification can directly attend the interview on 18-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: B.V.Sc & AH degree Veterinary Council Registration

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

all_official_links.label: Download Salem Aavin Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post at Salem Aavin is scheduled for 18th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications required for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon position, candidates must possess a B.V.Sc & AH degree and have valid Veterinary Council Registration.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post at Salem District Cooperative Milk Producers Union Ltd. (Salem Aavin).

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview for Salem Aavin Veterinary Assistant Surgeon recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Salem, Tamil Nadu, at the address provided in the official notification. The pincode for the location is 636302.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit specified for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon post?
faq.answer: The specific age limit details are not provided in the summary. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for precise age criteria and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Veterinary Assistant Surgeon position will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be evaluated based on their performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment offering?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Full Time job opportunity at Salem District Cooperative Milk Producers Union Ltd. (Salem Aavin).
